testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForURL: Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/review/**" until "load" ============================================================
171 | 172 | // Wait for redirect to review page - this takes several minutes > 173 | await page.waitForURL('**/review/**', { timeout: 180000 }) | ^ 174 | 175 | console.log('✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page') 176 | at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:173:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md]]

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
56 | 57 | // Wait for onboarding modal to appear > 58 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 59 | 60 | // Verify 3-step process is shown 61 | await expect(page.locator('text=Upload → Generate → Download')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:58:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Chrome] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded.
Error: page.click: Test timeout of 120000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Looks Good - Continue")') - waiting for" https://www.mycvbuddy.com/generate/2c8f14fa-d97e-4505-b38e-3d5d1a92453b" navigation to finish... - navigated to "https://www.mycvbuddy.com/generate/2c8f14fa-d97e-4505-b38e-3d5d1a92453b"
121 | 122 | // Click "Looks Good - Continue" button > 123 | await page.click('button:has-text("Looks Good - Continue")') | ^ 124 | console.log(' ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue"') 125 | 126 | // Wait for redirect to /generate/[id] page at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:123:16
